Study Guide

Use this page to organize the materials and expectations for your upcoming exam or assessment.

View your study guide in a different browser: Open in a new tab

Go over the following materials in your textbook:

  • Chapter 1: [topic or page range]
  • Chapter 2: [topic or page range]
  • Chapter 3: [topic or page range]

Review from homeworks, quizzes, exams:

Homework Quiz Exam
Homework 1 Quiz 1 Exam 1 Review
Homework 2 Quiz 2 Practice Problems
Homework 3 Quiz 3 Sample Questions

Plan of Action

Exam Starts: [time]

Paper or Online: [paper/online]

Respondus LockDown Browser: [Enabled/Disabled]

→ Screen Recording? Yes / No

→ Webcam? Yes / No

→ iPad usage? Yes / No

What is allowed

  • [Allowed item 1]
  • [Allowed item 2]
  • [Allowed item 3]

What is not allowed

  • [Not allowed item 1]
  • [Not allowed item 2]
  • [Not allowed item 3]

Note: Respondus recordings can be seen and reviewed by instructors at any time. Once a ban is issued, you cannot be unbanned.

If issues persist on Respondus LockDown Browser, contact your instructor first, then COLTT.
